sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68989" key="mu/eios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μύειος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">μῦς</etym>) <sense id="n68989.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of, belonging to mice, An.Ox.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0612.tlg001:2:286" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.286</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
